Technical Marketplace

Professional ECU cloning, software calibration, and hardware diagnostics delivered by certified automotive engineers.

Explore Services Custom Quote

ECU Cloning

Full bit-for-bit cloning of your existing ECU hardware to a replacement unit. Plug-and-play guaranteed with all VIN and immobilizer data preserved.

Starting from £75 Book Now

Software Re-mapping

Stage 1 & 2 performance calibrations, EGR/DPF/AdBlue solutions, and fuel economy optimizations for all modern diesel and petrol units.

Starting from £150 Book Now

Immobilizer Unlock

Immo-off services and virginizing for second-hand ECUs. Essential for custom engine swaps and track-day conversions.

Starting from £60 Book Now

Seamless Integration Process

01

Request Service

Submit your vehicle data through our secure portal.

02

Ship Hardware

Courier your original and/or target ECU to our London lab.

03

Lab Processing

Engineering team performs validation and bit-writing.

04

Express Return

Units are tested and shipped back via next-day trackable mail.

ECUDocs

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.
